name: boilerplate-api
description: Minimal Express + Drizzle boilerplate API with a sample CRUD and healthcheck.

scripts.test:integration: RUN_INTEGRATION_TESTS=true NODE_ENV=test node --env-file=.env ./node_modules/.bin/drizzle-kit migrate && RUN_INTEGRATION_TESTS=true NODE_ENV=test node --env-file=.env --import tsx --test --test-force-exit --test-reporter spec --test-concurrency=1 src/**/*.integration.spec.ts
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:coverage: RUN_INTEGRATION_TESTS=true NODE_ENV=test node --env-file=.env ./node_modules/.bin/drizzle-kit migrate && RUN_INTEGRATION_TESTS=true NODE_ENV=test node --env-file=.env --import tsx --test --test-force-exit --experimental-test-coverage --test-concurrency=1 src/**/*.spec.ts
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test
